hero.title: Livslust och hållbart stöd
hero.subtitle: We are here for you who have lost a loved one to suicide.

about.heading: About us
about.body: We are a non-profit organisation offering support, community, and resources to suicide loss survivors. You don't have to carry the grief alone — we understand and we are here.

offer.heading: What we offer
offer.body: We offer support groups, counselling, and information for those grieving a suicide loss. Everyone is welcome, regardless of how long ago it happened.

contact.heading: Contact us
contact.intro: Reach out to us – we are here for you.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! We will get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
